---
name: General Question
about: Ask a question about the repository
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

## ❓ Question
Please ask your question here. Be as specific as possible.

## 🎯 Context
Provide context for your question:
- What are you trying to learn or implement?
- Which topic/concept is related to your question?
- What have you already tried?

## 🔍 What You've Tried
Describe what you've already tried to solve your question or problem.

## 📚 Related Files
If your question is about specific files, please list them here:
- File: 
- Section/Line numbers:

## 💭 Expected Answer
What kind of answer are you looking for?
- [ ] Explanation of a concept
- [ ] Code example
- [ ] Guidance on implementation
- [ ] Resource recommendation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 🏷️ Category
What category does your question fall under?
- [ ] Algorithm explanation
- [ ] Data structure concept
- [ ] Code implementation
- [ ] Complexity analysis
- [ ] Repository usage
- [ ] Contribution process
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📎 Additional Information
Add any other information that might help answer your question.

---

Thanks for your question! We'll do our best to help you learn. 🚀
